Services

Your partner in high-impact AI services.

We take ownership of strategy, delivery, stability, and adoption so every AI system works under real business pressure, not just in a demo.

010203

Delivery Model

From business problem to working AI system.

Production-ready integrations
Secure data handling
Clear delivery ownership

AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants

Deploy intelligent chatbots that handle customer queries, support tickets, and lead generation — 24/7, across WhatsApp, Web, and Mobile.

Explore service

AI Agents & Workflows

Connect people, data, and tools with AI agents that automate approvals, documents, tickets, and multi-step workflows.

Explore service

Voice & Conversational AI

Deploy AI voice agents and conversational assistants for calls, chat, lead qualification, and customer support.

Explore service

Generative AI Services

Build enterprise-ready AI assistants, content engines, and knowledge tools powered by secure generative AI models.

Explore service

Custom AI Development

Need something unique? We build custom AI models, NLP engines, and LLM-powered applications tailored to your exact business logic.

Explore service

AI Consulting & Integration

Not sure where to start? Our AI consultants audit your processes, identify automation opportunities, and roadmap your AI journey.

Explore service

Process

We build with intent, and it shows in the rollout.

A clear path from discovery to scale keeps stakeholders aligned, technical risk visible, and business outcomes measurable.

01
DISCOVER

Discover

We audit your business workflows and identify the highest-impact AI opportunities.

02
BUILD

Build

Our team designs, trains, and integrates your custom AI solution — chatbot, voice bot, or automation pipeline.

03
SCALE

Scale

Go live, measure results, and continuously improve with real-time analytics and ongoing AI support.

Solutions

The results that change the way teams work.

Velar designs AI systems around your operating model, industry constraints, and the teams who need to use them every day.

01

Enterprises & Large Corporates

Scale AI across departments — customer support, HR, finance, and operations.

  • ✓Multi-department AI agents
  • ✓Enterprise-grade security & compliance
  • ✓Integration with SAP, Salesforce, Oracle
  • ✓Dedicated implementation team
02

SMBs & Startups

Affordable, fast-to-deploy AI tools that give small teams the power of large enterprises.

  • ✓Ready-to-use chatbot templates
  • ✓WhatsApp & website bot integration
  • ✓Pay-as-you-grow pricing
  • ✓Onboarding in under 7 days
03

Government & Public Sector

AI built for citizen services, public grievance handling, and government workflows.

  • ✓Multilingual chatbots (Hindi + regional languages)
  • ✓Grievance redressal automation
  • ✓Secure on-premise deployment options
  • ✓Compliant with government data policies

Why Velar

Built for real deployment, not showroom AI.

We focus on measurable workflows, India-first language needs, and practical integration choices that make AI easier to adopt.

Feature
Velar Info
Typical Vendors
India-first AI approach
Yes, Hindi + English
Mostly English only

Fully custom-built
Template-based only

Enterprise pricing only

Yes, compliant
Rarely available

Dedicated team
Ticket-based only

Available

Client Outcomes

Proof from teams using AI in the field.

Each engagement is designed around adoption: faster support, lower manual workload, and cleaner operational visibility.

VP Operations, FinTech Co.
